meaning: v.(指马) 使劲地嚼,焦急
examples: John McEnroe, a three-time Wimbledon champ, proclaimed it the best tennis tussle he had ever seen.
A: What do you think of the former champ?
'His accomplishment for the year was being the local darts champ.'
Crosspoint, the three-year champ, benefited from routermaker Juniper Networks and e-commerce software provider Ariba.
Former world chess champ Garry Kasparov also says he wants to be the next president, maybe.
